# Cyberlounge Portfolio

> Personal portfolio + lead-gen site (cyberlounge.net) for Nicholas Perry — positioned as a digital architect with defined taste. Built on Next.js 15 App Router.

## Project Overview

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 15.5.18, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 3, Framer Motion 12
**Status:** Active (Architect Tier 1 landed on `main`; Tier 2 Expressive layer planned)
**Purpose:** Showcase projects, communicate capabilities, route prospects to a Cal.com booking flow

## Core Documentation

- `README.md` — Setup and getting started
- `CODE_MAP.md` — Feature-to-file map
- `docs/ai/memory.md` — Project history and current state
- `docs/ai/roadmap.md` — Forward-looking priorities
- `docs/ai/tasks.md` — Active work + tech-debt list
- `docs/ai/decisions.md` — Architecture decisions (ADR-001 through ADR-006)
- `docs/ai/architecture.md` — System design + Architect design tokens
- `docs/plans/2026-05-19-architect-redesign-design.md` — Approved design doc for the Architect direction
- `docs/plans/2026-05-19-architect-redesign-implementation.md` — 24-task implementation plan across 3 tiers
- `ENTRY_POINTS.md` — Where execution starts
- `DATA_FLOW.md` — System-level data movement
- `FEATURE_BOUNDARIES.md` — Component responsibilities
- `IMPORT_GRAPH_SUMMARY.md` — Coupling overview

## Key Files by Area

### Site shell
- `src/app/layout.tsx` — Root layout, fonts (Geist sans/mono + Fraunces serif), metadata + metadataBase, Navbar/Footer mount
- `src/components/Navbar.tsx` — Top nav with accent underline on active route + mobile menu
- `src/components/Footer.tsx` — Footer with title-block treatment (corner labels + hairlines)
- `src/components/Frame.tsx` — Reusable title-block motif (corner-metadata slots + hairlines around content)
- `src/app/globals.css` — Design tokens (`--background`, `--ink`, `--muted`, `--rule`, `--surface`, `--accent`, `--hero-opsz`) + utility classes (`.label`, `.label-ink`, `.rule`, `.hero-opsz`, `.link-accent`)
- `tailwind.config.ts` — Tailwind theme mapping CSS variables + strict 1.250 type scale (up to `9xl` 168px)

### Pages (all static)
- `src/app/page.tsx` — Home: top title-block strip, massive Fraunces "Nicholas / Perry" hero, framed Capabilities (4 skill groups incl. Platforms & CRM / GoHighLevel), framed Selected Work
- `src/app/about/page.tsx` — `002 / ABOUT` strip, portrait+dossier hero, framed Expertise / Experience / Practice sections
- `src/app/projects/page.tsx` — `003 / PROJECTS — INDEX` strip, "Projects." hero, three full-width framed plates with corner metadata
- `src/app/contact/page.tsx` — `004 / CONTACT` strip, "Let's talk." hero, two-column card (Schedule / Channels)

### Shared
- `src/components/MotionWrapper.tsx` — Client-boundary `MotionDiv` re-export

## Common Tasks

**To run locally:** `npm install && npm run dev` → http://localhost:3000
**To build:** `npm run build && npm start`
**To lint:** `npm run lint`
**To change the design system:** edit both `src/app/globals.css` (CSS vars) AND `tailwind.config.ts` (theme tokens) — they must stay in sync.
**To add a project:** append to the `projects` array in `src/app/projects/page.tsx` and the `featuredProjects` array in `src/app/page.tsx`; drop the image at `public/projects/<slug>.{jpg,webp}`.
**To kick off Tier 2:** follow `docs/plans/2026-05-19-architect-redesign-implementation.md` tasks 12–22.

## Environment Variables

- None currently consumed by the codebase.
